result:
**Phase 2 complete.** All 15 `inputContext` copy changes applied to `AssessmentCoordinator.swift` and build verified:

- **moveConcerns** — shortened to remove Peezy intro
- **hasStorage** — reworded to "items in storage making the move"
- **anyKids** (NEW) — "Will any children be making the move with you?"
- **childrenInSchool** — "Will any of them need to transfer schools?"
- **childrenInDaycare** — "What about any in daycare?"
- **hasVet** — removed subheader
- **hasVehicles** — "How many vehicles will be moving with you?"
- **hireMovers** — shortened to "Would you like quotes for professional movers?"
- **hasDeclutter** — shortened header
- **wantToSell** — new copy with "plan b" language
- **hireCleaners** — reworded with "deep clean" framing
- **financialInstitutions** — new header + tap-to-add subheader
- **healthcareProviders** — new header + tap-to-add subheader
- **fitnessWellness** — new header + tap-to-add subheader
- **howHeard** — "what put Peezy on your radar?"
